recoder.java.statement
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing pure statements.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.

    Transformation.attach(Expression child, ExpressionJumpStatement parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
